rationale_source: F1.TT inferential resolution per R11-A: mortgage_statement presence + payout-keywords signal refinance even when broker silent on TT

transaction_type.rationale: Broker silent; loan_app TT empty. mortgage_statement attached with payout-keywords (per R11-B-2 doc identification). R11-A inferential field: mortgage_statement presence implies refinance. F1.TT inferred-tier.
